source.name: Lab 2.3: Add Response Variations (utter_goodbye)
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following checks must pass:

• Check 1: utter_goodbye has at least two - text: variations in domain/basics.yml.
source.guidance: Add a second - text: item to utter_goodbye under responses: in level1/domain/basics.yml (e.g. two different farewell messages).

sequence.feedback: utter_goodbye has at least two - text: variations in domain/basics.yml.
